scripts.check: node --check temporal-surface-integration.js && node --check browser-host.js && node --check main.js && node --check route-state.mjs && node --check validate-integration.mjs && node --check test-mutations.mjs
scripts.validate:quick: npm run check && npm run validate:unit && npm run test:mutations
scripts.validate:full: npm run validate:quick && npm run validate:artifacts
